summary: VenuLoQ iteration 87 - Swipable image carousel feature testing on mobile venue cards and Quick Preview modal. All features working correctly.

dot_indicators_on_venue_cards.details: 20 venue cards show dot indicators (data-testid='venue-card-dots-*') when venue has multiple images. Each card shows 5 dots for 5 images.

image_swipe_on_venue_cards.details: Touch swipe on venue card images (data-testid='venue-card-images-*') triggers image change. Transform changed from matrix(1,0,0,1,0,0) to matrix(1,0,0,1,-130,0) after swipe left.

swipe_does_not_navigate.details: Swiping on venue card images does NOT trigger navigation to venue page. URL remains on /venues/search after swipe.

dot_indicators_update_on_swipe.details: Active dot index changes from 0 to 1 after swiping left, indicating dot indicators update correctly.

quick_preview_modal_opens.details: Eye icon (data-testid='venue-card-preview-*') opens Quick Preview bottom sheet modal (data-testid='mobile-quick-preview').

quick_preview_images_swipable.details: Quick Preview modal has swipable images container (data-testid='quick-preview-images') with touch event handlers.

quick_preview_counter.details: Quick Preview modal shows image counter '1 / 5' in top-right corner, displaying current/total images.

quick_preview_dot_indicators.details: Quick Preview modal has 5 dot indicators centered at bottom of image area.

quick_preview_content.details: Modal displays: rating (4.9), venue name, location (Colaba, Mumbai), type (Hotel), capacity (50-1500 guests), amenities, price (₹ 6.5K/plate), View Details button.

share_button.details: 20 share buttons (data-testid='venue-card-share-*') present on venue cards.

favorite_button.details: 40 favorite buttons (data-testid='venue-card-fav-*') present. Heart icon turns red when favorited (tested while logged in).

venue_card_content.details: Venue cards correctly display: name (h3), location with MapPin icon, venue type badge, capacity, price (₹ format).

login_flow.details: Login with democustomer@venulock.in / password123 works. Redirects to /my-enquiries with 'Welcome back!' message.

critical_code_review_comments: Note: PostHog analytics throws 'Cannot destructure property clientX' error when synthetic Touch events are dispatched. This is a third-party analytics issue, not app functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Swipable image carousel feature fully working: 1) Mobile venue cards on /venues/search have swipable 130x130 image area with touch handlers (touchstart/touchmove/touchend), 2) Horizontal swipe >30px changes image, 3) Dot indicators at bottom-right show current position (active dot is larger 1.5x1.5 vs inactive 1x1), 4) Swipe blocks Link navigation via handleLinkClick checking touchRef.current.moved, 5) Quick Preview modal has larger swipable image carousel with counter (top-right) and centered dots (bottom), 6) Images capped at 5 per card, 8 in Quick Preview. Note: PostHog may show clientX errors on touch events but this doesn't affect functionality.
